name: The Mind Is a Computer — 20 Faceless Video Ebook Launch

maps.note: Human approval is required at decision firewalls. Approval gates are blocking states represented in code and data; they are not engineered around.

provenance.origin: Concept migrated from the audited local React/Vite prototype (frontend) per GitHub Issue #2. The prototype was a visual product shell, not a completed production system.
provenance.disclaimer: All pipeline activity in this build is mock/prototype data. No rendering, publishing, analytics, or external APIs are connected. Statuses are illustrative of the governed state model only.
